# Data Enrichment Log

**Version:** v2026-07-20
**Project:** Ethiopia Financial Inclusion Forecasting
**Generated by:** `src/data_enrichment.py`
**Input:** `data/raw/ethiopia_fi_unified_data.csv`
**Output:** `data/processed/ethiopia_fi_enriched.csv`

## Summary

- Total records: 57
- Record counts: {'observation': 30, 'impact_link': 14, 'event': 10, 'target': 3}
- Observation indicators: ACC_MM_ACCOUNT, ACC_MPESA_USERS, ACC_OWNERSHIP, ACC_OWNERSHIP_FEMALE, ACC_OWNERSHIP_MALE, ACC_OWNERSHIP_RURAL, ACC_OWNERSHIP_URBAN, ACC_TELEBIRR_USERS, INFRA_4G_COVERAGE, INFRA_AGENT_DENSITY, INFRA_ATM_DENSITY, INFRA_BANK_BRANCH, INFRA_MOBILE_PENETRATION, USG_ATM_WITHDRAWAL, USG_DIGITAL_PAYMENT, USG_DIGITAL_PAYMENT_FEMALE, USG_DIGITAL_PAYMENT_MALE, USG_P2P_TRANSFER, USG_WAGES_DIGITAL
- Core period covered for Ethiopia FI dynamics: 2011-2024

## Versioned Enrichment Fields

| version | field | source_url | confidence | rationale |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| v2026-07-20 | observation_year | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | high | Extracted year from observation_date for grouping and plotting. |
| v2026-07-20 | year_fraction | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | high | Continuous year used for trend and event overlay charts. |
| v2026-07-20 | indicator_label | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | high | Human-readable indicator names for notebooks and dashboard charts. |
| v2026-07-20 | confidence_score | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | high | Numeric score mapped from high/medium/low confidence. |
| v2026-07-20 | source_quality_score | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | medium | Confidence score multiplied by source-type weight. |
| v2026-07-20 | annualized_change | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | medium | Per-year change from the previous observation for the same indicator. |
| v2026-07-20 | prior_24m_events | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | medium | Events occurring in the 24 months before each observation. |
| v2026-07-20 | value_share_of_target_70 | https://globalfindex.worldbank.org | medium | Percent indicators expressed as progress toward the 70% 2030 access target. |

## Source Audit Rules

- `source_url_present` is true only when the source URL starts with `http`.
- `confidence_score` maps high/medium/low to 1.00/0.70/0.40.
- `source_quality_score` combines confidence with source type weights; survey sources carry the highest weight.
- `annualized_change` is calculated only within each indicator's own observed series.
- `prior_24m_events` supports event overlay plots without asserting causality.

## Rationale

The enriched dataset keeps the raw unified schema intact while adding fields needed for reproducible 2011-2024 exploratory analysis: time indexing, quality scoring, event proximity, and trend-change calculations. These transformations make the EDA notebook traceable back to source rows, source URLs, confidence levels, and rationale.
